LoginPage.metaDescription: Sign in to your ABRIEV account with Google, Facebook, or email — listings, favorites, and bookings together.
LoginPage.editorialRailBody: Happy to have you back. Sign in below when you're ready.
LoginPage.panelSubtitle: Continue with Google, Facebook, or your email and password.
LoginPage.forgotHint: Self-serve reset is on the way. Use the link above and we’ll help you from Contact.
LoginPage.oauthUnconfiguredBanner: Connect Google Sign-In or Facebook Login in environment variables — set AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET and AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_ID / AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET.
LoginPage.oauthFailedBanner: We couldn’t finish signing in with that provider. Try again or choose another option.
LoginPage.oauthStateBanner: Your session expired. Please try again.
LoginPage.credentialPasswordShort: Use at least 8 characters for your password.
LoginPage.credentialBackendPending: Email sign-in isn’t available yet. Please use Google or Facebook, or reach us via Contact for help.

RegisterPage.metaDescription: Join ABRIEV with Google, Facebook, or email — curated vehicles and verified dealers.
RegisterPage.editorialRailBody: Glad you're joining us. Use the form below — it only takes a minute.
RegisterPage.panelSubtitle: Use Google, Facebook, or email. Automated provisioning attaches once your tenancy is live.
RegisterPage.legalLead: By registering you agree to the
RegisterPage.oauthUnconfiguredBanner: Connect Google Sign-In or Facebook Login in environment variables — set AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET and AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_ID / AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET.
RegisterPage.oauthFailedBanner: We couldn’t finish registration with that provider. Try again or choose email.
RegisterPage.oauthStateBanner: Your session expired. Please try again.
RegisterPage.credentialNameShort: Add your full name (at least 2 letters).
RegisterPage.credentialBackendPending: Saved profiles are scaffolded until your tenancy is wired — finish with Google, Facebook, or concierge onboarding.
